stemHtml: An aircraft experiencing radio communication failure on an IFR flight in VMC should…

options.a: leave controlled airspace and continue the flight within uncontrolled airspace.
options.b: continue to fly in VMC if the weather allows, land at the nearest suitable aerodrome, and report arrival to ATC.
options.c: squawk IDENT and proceed to the alternate aerodrome.
options.d: continue the flight to destination aerodrome.
